agents_intake.note: Repo-local AGENTS workflow, issue-first rule, blueprint-first rule, and validation ladder were incorporated before non-trivial writes.

issue_branch_linkage.note: Issue #21 and branch `feat/21-implement-work-event-driven-compare-loop-for-smartgrow-advisor-tradeoffs` owned the bounded follow-up loop after issue #19; that loop is now merged into `main` via PR #22 and no new active issue has been opened yet.

harness_setup.note: docs/architecture and .rah remain initialized and reusable.

preserved_issue18_baseline.note: The landed knowledge/RAG/workbook/advisor seams from issue #18 are preserved as the compatibility baseline instead of the active architecture target.

model_first_prompt_intake.note: The April 7, 2026 model-first SmartGrow directive is now reflected in the blueprint, system brief, gap register, ADR, and module spec.

model_first_blueprint_alignment.note: Root and architecture blueprints now redirect the mainline toward crop models, gas exchange, scenarios, sensitivities, constraints, and model-aware advisor surfaces.

model_first_adr.note: ADR-001 records the model-first, RAG-explained architecture decision.

phase1_module_spec.note: Module-001 defines the bounded phase-1 state/event/runtime foundation for issue #19.

implementation_gate.note: The phase-1 persistence adapter is frozen as a separate SQLite sidecar at `artifacts/models/model_runtime.sqlite3`, and the migration seam is landed through `crop_models/`, `model_runtime/`, and `POST /api/models/snapshot|replay`.

legacy_model_inventory.note: Legacy tomato and cucumber model files remain available as donor logic for the new crop-model service layer.

crop_model_service_layer.note: Dedicated `crop_models/` wrappers now expose normalized cucumber and tomato state snapshots plus `leaf_removal` / `fruit_thinning` event application over the existing adapter seam.

work_event_state_store.note: A canonical `ModelStateStore` now persists `crop_model_states`, `crop_model_snapshots`, and `crop_work_events` in a dedicated SQLite sidecar, with replay-tested before/after snapshot linkage.

gas_exchange_service_layer.note: Reusable `gas_exchange_fvcb.py`, `stomatal_ball_berry.py`, and `canopy_integration.py` are now exposed through `crop_models/`, and the cucumber/tomato snapshot wrappers consume them to publish upper/middle/bottom leaf activity plus limiting-factor summaries.

scenario_sensitivity_runtime.note: The first backend-only `scenario_runner.py`, `sensitivity_engine.py`, and `constraint_engine.py` slice is now landed with additive `POST /api/models/scenario` plus `POST /api/models/sensitivity`, SQLite persistence for `scenario_runs`/`scenario_outputs`/`sensitivity_outputs`, and targeted sign/trust-region/scenario-alignment tests.

advisor_contract_realignment.note: Current `/api/advisor/*`, `/api/environment/recommend`, and `/api/work/recommend` flows now preserve the issue #18 field names while additively attaching a model-first `machine_payload.model_runtime` block built from the landed bounded scenario/sensitivity runtime, plus fallback-safe summary/chat envelopes and contract-locking orchestration tests.

ui_counterfactual_surface.note: The `environment`, `physiology`, and `work` advisor tabs now render additive `machine_payload.model_runtime` through a shared counterfactual/sensitivity panel, while preserving the existing issue #18 analysis and action cards as the compatibility shell.

assistant_harvest_runtime_alignment.note: The `harvest_market` tab now consumes the shared runtime panel, and the Assistant/chat UX now keeps `machine_payload.model_runtime` beside each AI reply through a compact snapshot-aware runtime strip without replacing the legacy text flow.

summary_runtime_surface.note: The dashboard-level `AiAdvisor` summary surface now threads `/api/advisor/summary` `machine_payload.model_runtime` into a compact model-first runtime strip, while `useAiAssistant` clears stale runtime on new requests and ignores late summary responses from older refreshes or crop switches.

weather_panel_resilience.note: Daegu weather fetches now fall back to cached or synthetic payloads when Open-Meteo times out or 502s, and the weather panel exposes cached/fallback provider status instead of presenting degraded data as live.

frontend_uiux_layout_polish.note: Sensor-card / AI-advisor height coupling decoupled via `items-start`, `auto-rows-fr` removal, `max-h` cap on advisor wrapper, and internal scroll boundaries in AiAdvisor. Validated with lint, build, and before/after screenshots at 1920x1080.

issue23_frontend_stabilization.note: Issue #23 local stabilization now adds `AppShell` plus shared loading/drawer fallbacks, Korean-first structured advisory display payloads across summary/chat, availability-aware chart nulling through `fieldAvailability`, per-field telemetry timestamps for KPI age labels, offline-over-missing summary precedence, mobile locale controls, localized cleanup across analytics/advisor surfaces, and an additional hardening pass that localizes visible SmartGrow/advisor copy plus stage/medium/common token labels while keeping the full local ladder green.

issue23_pr_validation.note: PR #24 head `7abf02a` now includes the Korean-visible-UI cleanup across App/header/advisor/chat/RAG surfaces plus localized WorkTab token rendering and refreshed Vitest expectations. The local ladder is green, screenshots remain under `screenshots/`, and GitHub Actions are rerunning before merge-time truth sync can close issue #23.

issue19_pr_validation.note: Issue #19 is closed and PR #20 is merged after the final local validation ladder (`poetry run ruff check .`, `poetry run pytest`, `npm --prefix frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix frontend run build`) plus green GitHub Actions push/pull_request runs.

work_event_compare_loop.note: Issue #21 now adds `ModelStateStore.load_current_state()` plus `list_work_events()`, an additive backend `work_event_compare` replay-diff contract over persisted snapshots and bounded `leaf_removal` / `fruit_thinning` candidates, and a dedicated `WorkTab` compare block beside the existing control-scenario runtime panel.

work_event_compare_hardening.note: Greenhouse scoping, malformed payload tolerance, store-unavailable degrade behavior, endpoint forwarding, crop-specific cucumber/tomato candidate agronomy, ranking, additive compare detail fields, backend matrix coverage, and a minimal frontend Vitest/RTL `WorkTab` component harness are now landed and locally validated.

issue21_pr_validation.note: PR #22 merged issue #21 into `main` after the green local ladder (`poetry run ruff check .`, `poetry run pytest`, `npm --prefix frontend run test`, `npm --prefix frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix frontend run build`) and successful GitHub Actions backend/frontend validation.

exact_advisor_surface_routes.note: Exact additive `/api/advisor/environment`, `/api/advisor/physiology`, `/api/advisor/work-tradeoff`, and `/api/advisor/harvest` routes now delegate over the landed model-aware tab surfaces, `/api/advisor/work-tradeoff` flattens the persisted compare contract into the directive-aligned summary/current_state/options response shape, and `/api/knowledge/status` advertises the exact routes alongside the preserved legacy seams.

rtr_good_production_windows_followup.note: Issue #3 remains blocked on grower-approved periods and is tracked separately from issue #19.
